settings.title: The Long Road Our Teachers Walked
settings.excerpt: Between our three teachers sit decades of practice and training across very different traditions.
settings.body:
The voice guiding you through a Stillpoint class carries years of practice behind it, and each of our teachers arrived by a different path.

Lena trained first as a dancer before a long study of alignment based yoga, which is why her cues are so precise. Tom came to the mat through meditation and brings a deep stillness to his slower classes.

Our newest teacher, Aisha, trained abroad over several years and leads our prenatal sessions with real care and knowledge.

None of them teach from a script. What you receive in class is the distilled result of a long, ongoing practice of their own. We think that shows.
